strap: Lancashire Clean Energy draws £591m of UKRI lead-led funding across 544 grants, anchored by Lancaster University (57%), with Centre For Ecology & Hydrology and Natural England on the industrial side.
behaviour: The cluster shows high-confidence "Forgiving instead of redesigning" and "Stabilising around incumbents" behaviour — research narrative is reinforced by recurring programme launches rather than narrowing toward commercial scaling, with academic capacity reabsorbing the cluster's signal.
